22Boost

No Crash. Just clean energy.

We provide smooth focus instead of an artificial spike in energy.

Tired of crashing?

Jitters aren't focus.

Spikes aren't performance.

Synthetic stimulants.

Artificial dyes.

Useless noise.

There's a better way.

Ingredient 1 / 3

Yerba Mate

Clean natural caffeine. Balanced energy. No jitters.

  • Natural caffeine — no synthetic stimulation
  • Clean lift. No spike. No drop.
  • Sharp focus without the chaos
Ingredient 2 / 3

L-Theanine

Calm focused alertness. Smooth stimulation. No crashes.

  • Makes caffeine smoother
  • Calm, locked-in focus
  • Flow state, not overstimulation
Ingredient 3 / 3

Rhodiola Rosea

Mental endurance under stress. Sustained performance all day.

  • Endurance for your brain
  • Fights fatigue under pressure
  • Performs when stress hits
Smooth Energy Not A Spike

Three ingredients.

Eliminating crashing altogether.
